items.title: Presentation: From Founding Engineer to CTO to CEO – At the Same Startup
items.summaryShort: Presentation: From Founding Engineer to CTO to CEO – At the Same Startup. Trisha Ballakur discusses her journey from a backend software engineer to CTO and CEO, using her startup Pointz as a case study.

items.title: Accountability is the Goal for AI, with EU Regulations Supporting Transparency
items.summaryShort: Accountability is the Goal for AI, with EU Regulations Supporting Transparency. AI bias mirrors human bias; both stem from our language and lived experiences.

items.title: Microsoft Announces Azure Linux 4.0, Its First General-Purpose Server Linux Distribution
items.summaryShort: Microsoft Announces Azure Linux 4.0, Its First General-Purpose Server Linux Distribution. Microsoft announced Azure Linux 4.0 and Azure Container Linux at Open Source Summit.

items.title: Article: Stragglers, Not Failures: How Adaptive Hedged Requests Reduce p99 Latency by 74 Percent
items.summaryShort: Article: Stragglers, Not Failures: How Adaptive Hedged Requests Reduce p99 Latency by 74 Percent. n fan-out microservice architectures, slow-but-completing requests accumulate across services and drive p99 latency far higher than per-servic

items.title: Cloudflare Adds Support for Claude Managed Agents
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Adds Support for Claude Managed Agents. Cloudflare recently added support for Claude Managed Agents, allowing developers to run and manage Claude agents within Cloudflare.

items.title: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket explodes during testing in Florida
items.summaryShort: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket explodes during testing in Florida. The explosion is likely a major setback for Jeff Bezos' spaceflight company, and its attempt to compete with SpaceX.

items.title: Glean's top line crosses $300M as AI budget-cutting becomes its major selling point
items.summaryShort: Glean's top line crosses $300M as AI budget-cutting becomes its major selling point. The enterprise AI search startup tripled its annual revenue even as tech giants entered the category.

items.title: Waymo dominates autonomous vehicle registrations as Tesla trails behind
items.summaryShort: Waymo dominates autonomous vehicle registrations as Tesla trails behind. A new law and AV tracker tool gives the clearest accounting yet of how many robotaxis and self-driving trucks are in Texas.
